context: Mainland China had become the center of gravity in C-pop, with QQ Music, NetEase Cloud Music, and Kugou dominating streaming. The idol group TFBoys became a massive phenomenon with three songs in the top ten. Faye Wong made a notable return with film soundtrack work. The 'Little Fresh Meat' idol culture was at its peak, and Karen Mok's rendition of W.B. Yeats became a cross-generational hit.

tracks.title: Dang Ni Lao Le (When You Are Old)
Xing Zou De Li Liang (Power to Go)
